title: Cleanse The Flesh
description: A mod created using MCreator so that one can turn rotten flesh into leather.
body:
# Cleanse The Flesh

Cleanse The Flesh or CTF is a Minecraft mod (or datapack) which adds only one feature:
You can now smelt rotten flesh into leather.

_This mod was done using MCreator and The Modrinth DataPack to Mod tool. It may contain bugs._
